div.p: T+0ms: Consumer-3 joins T+5ms: Coordinator detects change, locks group T+10ms: Assignments revoked T+50ms: New mapping calculated T+100ms: Assignments pushed T+150ms: Group unlocked T+30s: Visibility timeout expires

ol.li: Send new assignments to all members

ul.li: C1 has 3 in-flight -> mark VisibleAfter = now()
C2 has 2 in-flight -> mark VisibleAfter = now()

After VisibilityTimeout (30s):
Unacked -> re-queue to new partition owner
Acked -> remove from in-flight
